title: Logisticians
description: Analyze and coordinate the ongoing logistical functions of a firm or organization. Responsible for the entire life cycle of a product, including acquisition, distribution, internal allocation, delivery, and final disposal of resources.

tasks.text: Maintain and develop positive business relationships with a customer's key personnel involved in, or directly relevant to, a logistics activity.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop an understanding of customers' needs and take actions to ensure that such needs are met.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage subcontractor activities, reviewing proposals, developing performance specifications, and serving as liaisons between subcontractors and organizations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop proposals that include documentation for estimates.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review logistics performance with customers against targets, benchmarks, and service agreements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct availability and allocation of materials, supplies, and finished products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Redesign the movement of goods to maximize value and minimize costs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Explain proposed solutions to customers, management, or other interested parties through written proposals and oral presentations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct team activities, establishing task priorities, scheduling and tracking work assignments, providing guidance, and ensuring the availability of resources.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform managerial duties such as hiring and training employees and overseeing facility needs or requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other departments as necessary to meet customer requirements, to take advantage of sales opportunities or, in the case of shortages, to minimize negative impacts on a business.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Report project plans, progress, and results.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Protect and control proprietary materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stay informed of logistics technology advances and apply appropriate technology to improve logistics processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and implement technical project management tools, such as plans, schedules, and responsibility and compliance matrices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide project management services, including the provision and analysis of technical data.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage the logistical aspects of product life cycles, including coordination or provisioning of samples, and the minimization of obsolescence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform system lifecycle cost analysis and develop component studies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, organize, and execute logistics support activities, such as maintenance planning, repair analysis, and test equipment recommendations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in the assessment and review of design alternatives and design change proposal impacts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and support the compilation and analysis of technical source data necessary for product development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Support the development of training materials and technical manuals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
